function_v0.doc:
Execute a two-leg atomic arbitrage across any supported venue.

Token flow:
1. Pull `amount_in` of `token_in` from caller into contract
2. Swap on venue_a: token_in \xe2\x86\x92 token_mid
3. Swap on venue_b: token_mid \xe2\x86\x92 token_in
4. Assert profit >= min_profit
5. Return all token_in to caller

Swap paths are derived: leg A = [token_in, token_mid], leg B = [token_mid, token_in].
venue_a / venue_b: 0 = Soroswap, 1 = Aquarius, 2 = Phoenix
function_v0.name: arb
